title: Warning-WIDTH for operator inside a widening width cast

features.name: binary operator inside widening width cast
features.description: Code should include a widening width cast containing a binary arithmetic operator where operand widths are smaller than the cast target width

features.name: unsigned constant in widening width cast expression
features.description: Code should include an unsigned integer constant parameter used inside a widening width cast expression
features.snippet:
localparam int unsigned offset = 64;
logic [35:0] r = 36'(offset/8);
